title: Async functions should not contain synchronous subprocess calls
description: This rule checks if an async function invokes synchronous subprocess calls which can lead to blocking and unpredictable behavior.
message: Async function contains a synchronous subprocess call.
recommendation: Consider using async subprocess calls or moving the synchronous subprocess call to a separate synchronous function.

noncompliant.description: Async function calls a synchronous subprocess command.

compliant.code:
import asyncio
async def a():
    async with asyncio.subprocess.run(['command']) as proc:
        await proc
compliant.description: Async function uses async subprocess call.

why_is_this_an_issue: Synchronous subprocess calls in async functions can lead to blocking and unpredictable behavior.
how_to_fix: Consider using async subprocess calls or moving the synchronous subprocess call to a separate synchronous function.
